title: CI/CD: Changesets + npm Trusted Publisher
summary: Added a full CD release pipeline on top of the existing CI workflow. Uses Changesets for PR-based versioning and npm Trusted Publisher (OIDC) for secretless publishing.
detail: Created .changeset/config.json (public access, main branch), .github/workflows/release.yml (triggers after CI passes on main via workflow_run, uses changesets/action to create Version Packages PR or publish). Added @changesets/cli to devDependencies. No NPM_TOKEN needed — uses OIDC provenance. One-time setup required on npmjs.com: jfl package → Settings → Publish Access → Add Provenance (repo: 402goose/jfl-cli, workflow: release.yml).
incomplete: npm Trusted Publisher setup on npmjs.com not yet configured (one-time manual step)
next: Merge PR #9, complete npm Trusted Publisher setup, then test with npx changeset flow
